topNews.title: Project Glasswing: An Initial Update
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Project Glasswing has released an initial update on its progress.  
• Why it matters: This update provides insights into the project's development and future direction.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can explore partnerships or investments in innovative technologies showcased by Project Glasswing.

topNews.title: Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Microsoft revealed that AI implementation costs exceed those of hiring human workers.  
• Why it matters: This challenges the assumption that AI will always be a cost-saving solution for businesses.  
• Business opportunity: Companies may need to reassess their AI strategies and explore cost-effective human resource solutions.

topNews.title: DHS Quits Granting Green Cards–Almost
topNews.summary:
• What happened: The Department of Homeland Security has halted the issuance of green cards.  
• Why it matters: This decision impacts immigration processes and may affect workforce availability in various sectors.  
• Business opportunity: Companies may need to explore alternative talent acquisition strategies to address potential labor shortages.

topNews.title: Show HN: I built a powerful RAG and knowledge graph agent that runs locally
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Claw-Coder is an AI agent that runs locally on your laptop and has access to powerful tools instead of configuring claude or codex to use a local model just use claw-coder. Why was claw-coder created? Answer: To solve the problem of privacy and security. When you use an agent that is configured with…
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Claw-Coder, a local AI agent with advanced tools, was developed for enhanced privacy and security.  
• Why it matters: It addresses concerns over data privacy by allowing users to run powerful AI tools locally without relying on cloud services.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for businesses to adopt local AI solutions to enhance data security and privacy compliance.

topNews.title: Anthropic's "Profitability" Swindle
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Anthropic has been accused of misleading claims regarding its profitability.  
• Why it matters: This raises concerns about transparency and trust in AI startups.  
• Business opportunity: Investors may seek more rigorous financial disclosures from AI companies.

topNews.title: Parsing IPv6 Addresses Crazily Fast with AVX-512
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Parsing IPv6 Addresses Crazily Fast with AVX-512
topNews.summary:
• What happened: A new method for rapidly parsing IPv6 addresses using AVX-512 technology has been developed.  
• Why it matters: This advancement significantly enhances network performance and efficiency in handling IPv6 traffic.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can leverage this technology to improve their networking solutions and gain a competitive edge in the market.

topNews.title: White House ordering agencies to place its new app on all employees' govt phones
topNews.rawTextSnippet: White House ordering agencies to place its new app on all employees' govt phones
topNews.summary:
• What happened: The White House has mandated that all government agencies install its new app on employees' phones.  
• Why it matters: This move aims to enhance communication and streamline operations within federal agencies.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can develop tools and services that integrate with government apps to improve efficiency and user experience.

topNews.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Some AI startups are inflating their Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) metrics to showcase growth.  
• Why it matters: This practice can mislead investors and distort the true financial health of these companies.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for developing tools that provide transparent revenue analytics for startups.

topNews.title: Herdr: A tmux-like terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents
topNews.rawTextSnippet: Herdr: A tmux-like terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Herdr, a terminal multiplexer similar to tmux, was introduced for AI coding agents.  
• Why it matters: It enhances productivity by allowing multiple AI coding agents to operate simultaneously in a single terminal.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for developing tools and services that integrate with Herdr to optimize AI coding workflows.

topNews.title: MediaUse Makes FIFA 2026 Programmable for AI Agents (No Vision)
topNews.rawTextSnippet: MediaUse Makes FIFA 2026 Programmable for AI Agents (No Vision)
topNews.summary:
• What happened: MediaUse announced that FIFA 2026 can be programmed for AI agents without visual input.  
• Why it matters: This innovation enhances the interactivity and engagement of AI in sports events.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can develop AI-driven applications to enhance fan experiences during FIFA 2026.

research.title: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on Large Language Models Pre-training
research.rawTextSnippet: Large language models (LLMs) are typically trained on shuffled corpora, yielding models whose knowledge is frozen at train time and whose temporal grounding remains poorly understood. dailyBrief: Today in AI news, Project Glasswing has released an initial update, showcasing advancements that could enhance data-driven decision-making for businesses. Meanwhile, Microsoft revealed that the operational costs of AI systems may exceed those of human employees, prompting companies to reassess their workforce strategies. In a surprising move, the Department of Homeland Security has nearly halted the issuance of green cards, which could impact the talent pool for tech firms reliant on skilled labor. Additionally, a new locally-run RAG and knowledge graph agent has been unveiled, offering businesses a powerful tool for data management. Lastly, concerns have emerged around Anthropic's profitability claims, raising questions about the sustainability of AI startups in a competitive market.
